creator: Harlan.Stenn@pfcs.com
text:
I reboot the 2.2-current machine, and cd to, say, the exim-1.62
	sources which are automounted off of a 2.1.0 machine.  I cd to the
	Build-FreeBSD-FreeBSD subdir and type "make".  Somewhere between
	compiling the 3rd file and the final link command, the make hangs.
	Eventually, a "df" will hang, as will "ls".

How-To-Repeat: 
	From (my, at least) 2.2-current machine, freshly booted, cd to the
	NFS-mounted source directory, type "make", and wait.

	I'll provide an ssh login to somebody who can help debug this.  I
	can probably "do what I'm told", also.
